positive: A celestial, geometric owl perched on a crescent moon, rendered in Art Nouveau stained-glass style. The owl has detailed feather patterns outlined in gold filigree and iridescent blues, set against a cosmic background of swirling nebula gas, deep indigo, and emerald green. Composition is symmetrical, highly detailed, and suitable for a central apparel print. Strong contrast between the vibrant subject and the dark background. Studio lighting, vector quality, high saturation, clean silhouette, isolated on a solid negative space background.
